event: View of the Alexandrinsky Theatre in Winter
description: An illustration depicting the Alexandrinsky Theatre in Saint Petersburg during winter. The neoclassical theatre building with its columned portico occupies the center-right of the composition, while other grand buildings line the snowy square. A statue stands before the theatre, and small figures walk across the snow-covered ground. A horse-drawn carriage with a prominent red wheel moves through the foreground on the right. Bare trees stand against a pale winter sky. Cyrillic text at the bottom identifies the building.
